digest.title: LLM Daily Report
digest.llmGenerating: LLM is generating the report, usually takes 30–60 seconds…
digest.noReport: No report yet, click to regenerate

freshInput.label: Fresh input
freshInput.tooltip: Input tokens that were not served from cache. Higher = more compute and cost.
freshInput.relation: Total input ≈ Fresh In + Cache Read + Cache Write

cacheRead.label: Cache read
cacheRead.tooltip: Input tokens served from cache. Higher = lower cost and latency.
cacheRead.relation: Part of total input; does not appear in fresh compute cost

cacheWrite.label: Cache write
cacheWrite.tooltip: Tokens written to cache for future requests. Billed at a premium but saves on future reads.
cacheWrite.relation: Separate billing item — not fresh input, not output

output.label: Output
output.tooltip: Tokens generated by the model. The primary driver of latency tail.
output.relation: Total output = Output + Reasoning (if shown separately)

contextUsed.label: Context
contextUsed.tooltip: Tokens placed in the model window this call. Not the same as billing tokens.
contextUsed.relation: Context = Fresh In + Cache Read + reused written context

contextDelta.label: Context Δ
contextDelta.tooltip: Change in context size vs. the previous call. Useful to spot which step inflated the window.

peakContext.label: Peak context
peakContext.tooltip: Largest context window observed in this session or turn.

cacheRatio.label: Cache ratio
cacheRatio.tooltip: cache_read / (fresh_input + cache_read + cache_write). Higher = better cache efficiency.

sessionDetail.noTurns: No conversation data for this day
